cards.title: Initialize monorepo with pnpm workspaces
cards.description: Set up monorepo structure with /apps /web /api /shared-types

cards.title: Create shared-types package structure
cards.description: Set up package.json, tsconfig, export entry points

cards.title: Define TypeScript interfaces (Task, Comment, Status)
cards.description: Create interfaces for Task, Comment, Status, Board types
acceptance_criteria: Task interface includes id, title, description, status, owner, acceptance_criteria, comments
Status type is union of: backlog, in_progress, review, done, blocked

cards.title: Export types from shared-types
cards.description: Export all interfaces and types for consumption by other packages

cards.title: Create shared-types package
cards.description: Define Task, Comment, Status types

cards.title: Create Board container component with flex layout
cards.description: Set up main Board component with horizontal flex container, responsive sizing
acceptance_criteria: Flex layout enables horizontal scroll on overflow

cards.title: Define column configuration
cards.description: Create column config with status mapping, colors, labels for all 5 columns
acceptance_criteria: Config defines Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done, Blocked

cards.title: Create Column component with header and scrollable area
cards.description: Build reusable Column component with title, count badge, scrollable task list
acceptance_criteria: Column shows header with title and count

comments.author: amora
comments.text: Validated: Header with title/count implemented in JSX. Added styles.css with .column-content { overflow-y: auto } for independent scrolling. Build passes.

cards.title: Render tasks filtered by status in each column
cards.description: Connect board to state, filter tasks by status and render in correct column
acceptance_criteria: Tasks appear in correct column based on status

cards.title: Add empty state for columns with no tasks
cards.description: Display placeholder message in empty columns

cards.title: Add column styling (colors, borders, backgrounds)
cards.description: Apply column-specific colors, borders, background styles per spec
acceptance_criteria: Each column has distinct header color

cards.title: Create Board component with column layout
cards.description: Implement 5 columns: Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done, Blocked

cards.title: Install and configure @dnd-kit dependencies
cards.description: Add @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, @dnd-kit/utilities to project

comments.author: amora
comments.text: Installed @dnd-kit/core ^6.3.1, @dnd-kit/sortable ^10.0.0, @dnd-kit/utilities ^3.2.2 via pnpm. Build passes. No peer dependency conflicts.

cards.title: Implement DnD context and sensors
cards.description: Set up DndContext with mouse/keyboard sensors

comments.author: amora
comments.text: Implementing DnD context with mouse and keyboard sensors. Cron job picked up oldest backlog task.

cards.title: Create Droppable column components
cards.description: Make each column a droppable zone with proper hooks

cards.title: Implement drag handlers and status update
cards.description: Handle onDragEnd, update task status in state/API

cards.title: Create Card base component with styling
cards.description: Card container with base styles and hover effects

cards.title: Add task ID and title display
cards.description: Show formatted ID and title on card

cards.title: Add owner badge component
cards.description: Display owner avatar/name badge on card

cards.title: Add status color indicator and metadata
cards.description: Status color bar, comment count, blocked indicator

cards.title: Create Drawer component structure
cards.description: Side panel layout with open/close animation

cards.title: Implement task detail display
cards.description: Show title, description, acceptance criteria in drawer

cards.title: Add status and owner controls
cards.description: Editable status dropdown and owner selector

cards.title: Implement comments section
cards.description: Display and add comments in drawer

comments.author: amora
comments.text: Comments section implemented in Drawer.jsx with display, add, and type selection. Fully functional.

cards.title: Create FilterBar component
cards.description: Container for all filter controls

comments.author: amora
comments.text: FilterBar component created with search, status pills, owner pills, and blocked toggle.

cards.title: Implement search filter
cards.description: Text search across title and description

cards.title: Implement status and owner dropdowns
cards.description: Filter by status and owner via dropdowns

comments.author: amora
comments.text: Status and owner filters implemented as clickable pills with multi-select.

cards.title: Add blocked toggle and URL persistence
cards.description: Toggle to show blocked tasks, sync filters to URL

comments.author: amora
comments.text: Blocked toggle and URL persistence implemented. Filters sync to URL params (search, statuses, owners, blocked).

cards.title: Create System Overview Panel
cards.description: Header panel showing column counts and system state

cards.title: Create Project State View
cards.description: Collapsible section with modules, patterns, risks

cards.description: Set up WebSocket client for real-time updates

cards.title: Implement board state sync
cards.description: Sync board state on WebSocket events

cards.title: Implement validation rules
cards.description: Single in_progress, valid transitions, required fields, blocked comments

cards.title: Create OverviewPanel container component
cards.description: Header container with flex layout for stats display

cards.description: Display task count per column with color coding

cards.description: Show WebSocket connection status, sync state, last update time

cards.title: Create ProjectStateView container
cards.description: Collapsible section container with toggle button

cards.title: Implement modules overview
cards.description: Show list of modules/packages in project

cards.title: Add patterns section
cards.description: Display architectural patterns and decisions

cards.title: Add risks/trade-offs panel
cards.description: Show known risks and trade-off decisions

cards.title: Set up WebSocket client module
cards.description: Create WS client with reconnection logic

cards.title: Implement connection state management
cards.description: Track connected/disconnected/reconnecting states

cards.title: Add auto-reconnect with backoff
cards.description: Reconnect on disconnect with exponential backoff

cards.title: Handle conflict resolution
cards.description: Merge concurrent updates without data loss

cards.title: Optimistic UI updates
cards.description: Update UI immediately, rollback on failure

cards.title: Implement single in_progress rule
cards.description: Prevent multiple tasks in_progress per owner

cards.title: Add valid transition checks
cards.description: Validate status transitions (e.g. no Done->Backlog)

cards.title: Implement required fields validation
cards.description: Require title, description before leaving Backlog

cards.title: Add blocked task comment requirement
cards.description: Require comment when moving to Blocked

cards.title: Task Detail Modal
cards.description: When clicking on a task card, a modal must open displaying full task details

cards.title: Drag and Drop Task Management
cards.description: Implement drag and drop functionality in the Kanban board

comments.author: banner
comments.text: Drag and drop fully implemented with @dnd-kit. Supports dragging between columns, reordering within columns, and automatic status updates on drop.
